adjudication.rationale: Research structure, current product mappings, direct allergen authority, target repair, Ingredient Intelligence timing, focused validation, and idempotency passed the POC terminal gates.

notes: POC worker artifacts persisted by the root coordinator.

repairs.summary: Applied and validated the restaurant-specific POC catalog repair.
verificationCommands: target publication: merge binding review catalog and annotate Ingredient Intelligence
focused target readback: 110 products, DC source/location, alcohol exclusion, nonalcoholic inclusion, direct evidence references
mechanical evidence normalization: rename all four source evidenceId fields to ledger-required id fields
mechanical evidence contract correction: add retrievedAt to all four canonical sources while preserving currentAsOf
mechanical evidence content correction: add reviewed-page excerpts to all four canonical sources
focused validation: required evidence fields, retrievedAt, captured-content gate, unique ids, and resolution of all dossier, current-product, and surface evidence references
repeat identical evidence content correction and compare evidence output

notes: Return the result for repair while preserving verifierOutcome=discrepancy_found.
Replace the affected baseline set with the 14-item corrected set and update reconciliation counts to 14 mismatch, 10 accurately unavailable, and 21 verified.
Reclassify boneless-buffalo-chicken-wings as verified.
Reclassify philly-cheesesteak, baby-japanese-peaches, and berry-merengon as mismatches based on explicit restaurant-issued positives.
Treat inaccessible_source as cleared for current accessibility and cross_contact as an evidence-gap caution, not a positive cross-contact finding.
Expand the omitted-product inventory across lunch, tasting, spirit-free, and other nonalcoholic beverage offerings without inferring complete allergen arrays or negatives.
Binding Sol review applied: complete 110-product current DC food and explicitly nonalcoholic catalog.
